rationale.completeness: Fully implements all requirements: PluginProtocol interface with all four lifecycle hooks (on_startup, on_shutdown, before_request, after_request) and automatic OpenAPI schema extension via openapi_schema method.
rationale.correctness: Core logic works but has issues: import statement inside merge_openapi_schemas function, incomplete path merging in OpenAPI schema (only adds new paths without merging operations), no error handling if plugin hooks raise exceptions, and the call_plugin_hooks comparison logic is unusual.
rationale.style: Uses type hints consistently, follows docstring conventions, and is Pythonic. Minor issue: import copy should be at module level. Otherwise consistent with typical FastAPI style.
rationale.quality: Code is readable with good separation of concerns, but has some maintainability issues: SimpleResponse class created inside middleware method, missing error handling in hooks, and the dynamic import reduces clarity.
